title: Palo Alto Networks Cortex XSOAR Incidents
description: This dashboard provides visibility into incidents, highlighting volume, trends over time, types, status, severity, and source details along with investigation context such as users, playbooks, and resolution data.

definition.content:
This dashboard provides visibility into incidents, highlighting volume, trends over time, types, status, severity, and source details along with investigation context such as users, playbooks, and resolution data. Use this dashboard to monitor incident activity, track progress, and support analysis and response.

For more information, see the [Palo Alto Networks Cortex XSOAR Integration Documentation](https://docs.datadoghq.com/integrations/palo_alto_networks_cortex_xsoar/).

**Tips**
- Use the timeframe selector in the upper-right corner of the dashboard to change the default timeframe.
- Clone this dashboard to rearrange, modify, and add widgets and visualizations.

This group provides a high-level view of incident activity, including incident volume, trends, types, and status details. Use this group to quickly assess overall incident flow and identify areas requiring attention.

This group provides insights into incident activity in Palo Alto Networks Cortex XSOAR, including log trends, source integrations, incident hierarchy, running status, severity distribution, and closure details.
